title: SILVER BREEZE - Riva 86 Domino
description:
SILVER BREEZE is an elegant 26-meter Riva 86 Domino motor yacht offering an exceptional charter experience in the Mediterranean. Built in 2010 and refitted in 2023, she combines iconic Italian design with powerful performance. 

Accommodating up to eight guests in four stylish cabins, the yacht features spacious sunbathing areas, a large swim platform and sophisticated interiors. 

Ideal for exploring the French Riviera and nearby Mediterranean destinations, SILVER BREEZE delivers both luxury and speed for an unforgettable charter.
